reviews.review_msg: Ralph is a kind man who is very passionate and knowledgeable about his field in circadian rhythms. However, that was one of the HARDEST courses I've ever taken (the curve saved my grade). I found the lectures extremely dry and rambley, but he records them luckily. Just REALLY read the modules, watch at 1.5x speed and slowdown/rewatch when confused.

While this course was lecture and material heavy, the Professor was a fair grader and brought in a very rounded grading scale. The end of the course was the most interesting to me, but overall there was a lot to learna and while it could be dense I still enjoyed it!
